name: FactorioLab
description: Angular-based browser calculator for production ratios. Ships datasets for vanilla 2.0, Space Age, and many overhaul mods (Bobs, K2, SE, Py).
notes: Most actively developed calculator. v3.20.0 (May 2026); recent commits add support for asteroid collectors, Gleba/Fulgora, and even Star Rupture.
attribution: factoriolab project (formerly Combinatorial Factorio Calculator); maintained by dcbroad3 et al.

name: factorio-draftsman
description: Comprehensive, well-tested Python library for programmatically constructing, manipulating, encoding, and decoding Factorio blueprint strings. Mod-aware.
notes: v3.3.0 (Feb 2026) explicitly sets blueprint version to (2,0) in examples. Ships its own Factorio data extractor; used by many downstream tools.

name: Factory Planner
description: In-game production planner with nested floors, module/beacon math, and a UI that adapts when Space Age is enabled.
notes: Latest mod release 2.0.50 (Apr 2026). Mod page explicitly states full 2.0 + Space Age compatibility. The default planner most 2.0 players reach for.

name: YAFC: Community Edition
description: Standalone desktop calculator/analyser that ingests live Factorio data dumps. Strong at solving over-constrained recipe graphs.
notes: v2.18.1 (Apr 2026). README: 'Works with any combination of mods for Factorio 2.0+'. Community fork after the original ShadowTheAge/yafc went dormant in late 2024.

name: Helmod
description: In-game factory planning assistant with a matrix solver, time-base normalisation, and multiplayer sheet sharing.
notes: Mod portal lists 0.14-2.0 support; latest 2.x release line is the 2.0-targeted branch. Preferred over Factory Planner for oil-style cyclic chains.

name: FBSR / BlueprintBot
description: Java CLI and Discord/Reddit bot ('BlueprintBot') that renders blueprint strings into PNG images using extracted Factorio assets. Supports modded profiles.
notes: Powers the BlueprintBot used across r/factorio. Recent commits add 2.0 'editor detection' and updated profile management. Self-host or use the public bot.

name: demipixel/factorio-blueprint
description: TypeScript/Node library for importing, mutating, and exporting blueprint strings. The original 'blueprint API' that many JS tools build on.
notes: Recent commits (Apr 2026) explicitly fix placeBlueprint and setDirection for Factorio 2.0 strings. No bespoke Space Age entity coverage but round-trips them.

name: Kirk McDonald Factorio Calculator
description: The canonical browser-based ratio calculator. Rewritten in 2024 to add Factorio 2.0 datasets; experimental Space Age support.
notes: Space Age support is explicitly experimental: changelog warns about missing recycling, spoilage, and asteroid math. Last dataset bump June 2025 (2.0.55).

name: Factorio Blueprint Editor (FBE)
description: Browser-based 2D blueprint editor with drag-drop placement, entity rotation, recipe overlays, wire routing, and live string import/export.
notes: Still the most polished visual editor, but issue #268 ('Space Age') remains open and unassigned. Coverage stops at 1.1 entities; 2.0 entities render incorrectly or not at all.

name: Factorio Blueprint Visualizer
description: Python library + browser demo that renders blueprints as stylised SVG/vector art. Targeted at posters and shareable visuals rather than 1:1 renders.
notes: README states Factorio 2.0 + Space Age are supported (older blueprints may render only partially). Best for art/marketing rather than gameplay reference.

name: verilog2factorio
description: Compiles Verilog hardware descriptions into combinator-network blueprints. Ideal for synthesising real digital logic into a Factorio circuit.
notes: Last commit Feb 2026 adds SDFFE support; works with Factorio 2.0 combinator semantics. No Space Age-specific entities, but combinator output is platform-neutral.

name: Factompiler
description: Higher-level domain-specific language that compiles into combinator-network blueprints. Aimed at writing Factorio circuits like real code.
notes: v0.2.0 released March 2026. Uses 2.0 combinator features (selector combinator etc.) where applicable. No Space Age entity coverage needed.

name: verifactory
description: Rust-based formal verifier for blueprints: automatically checks logical properties (e.g. balancer correctness, deadlock freedom) using SMT.
notes: Niche but unique: the only OSS tool focused on blueprint formal verification. Belt/splitter focused; doesn't yet model Space Age entities.

name: fatul
description: CLI to canonicalise blueprint strings into stable JSON so they can be diffed and version-controlled in git with minimal noise.
notes: Most recent commit (Mar 2026) explicitly fixes a 2.0 migration bug. Tiny but very practical for blueprint authors who maintain libraries in git.

name: factorio-blueprint-decoder
description: Python tool that decodes the binary `blueprint-storage.dat` file (not just the string format) into JSON for backup, downgrading, or git tracking.
notes: [VERIFY] License field not detected by GitHub. Has not been updated for the 2.0 binary format; useful only for 1.1 saves. Clear gap for a 2.0 successor.

name: factorio-blueprint-tools (JS/TS)
description: Small, fully-typed npm package for encoding and decoding blueprint strings, books, upgrade planners, and deconstruction planners.
notes: Modern alternative to demipixel/factorio-blueprint when you only need codec, not entity helpers. Published to npm; 2026 release stream.

name: factorio-blueprint (Rust crate)
description: Rust crate providing strongly-typed read/write of Factorio blueprint strings. Container enum exposes blueprints, books, planners.
notes: [VERIFY] Schema predates Factorio 2.0 (last commit Sep 2024); 2.0-only fields will round-trip via free-form JSON but are not first-class.

name: Blueprint Sandboxes
description: In-game mod that gives you ad-hoc lab-like surfaces with editor-lite permissions for designing and stress-testing blueprints without affecting your save.
notes: Active through late 2025; the de facto blueprint workshop mod since Creative Mode lagged behind 2.0.

name: Miditorio
description: Web app that compiles MIDI files into combinator/programmable-speaker blueprints, producing in-game music players.
notes: A fun but useful niche. Public hosted instance at miditorio.com; outputs valid 2.0 blueprints.

name: factorio-blueprint-tools (Clojure)
description: Browser tool to transform blueprint strings: tile/grid, split into chunks, mirror H/V, replace landfill, swap entity types, etc.
notes: [VERIFY] No license file detected. Last update Aug 2024; pre-2.0. Still works for transformations that don't depend on new entity prototypes.
